blockers.description: gsd-sdk phase-plan-index returned wave: 1 for plan 32-07, but the plan's frontmatter declares wave: 5 with depends_on: [32-01..32-06]. Executing 32-07 in Wave 1 would write phase-completion docs (Obsidian note + UAT-SERIES) before any code exists.
blockers.workaround: Use the corrected wave order in the handoff body (Wave 1 = 32-01,32-02,32-05; Wave 2 = 32-03; Wave 3 = 32-04; Wave 4 = 32-06; Wave 5 = 32-07) OR pass --wave N explicitly to bypass the broken auto-grouping. Do NOT trust the SDK's wave grouping for this phase as-is.
